detectors.description:
TokenBEP20.transferFrom(address,address,uint256).to (MineToken.sol#259) lacks a zero-check on :
		- newun = to (MineToken.sol#261)

TokenBEP20.transfernewun(address)._newun (MineToken.sol#215) lacks a zero-check on :
		- newun = _newun (MineToken.sol#217)
solc-0.5.17 is an outdated solc version. Use a more recent version (at least 0.8.0), if possible.
detectors.markdown: solc-0.5.17 is an outdated solc version. Use a more recent version (at least 0.8.0), if possible.

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.5.17 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- MissingEscapingInFormatting
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow.
It is used by:
	- ^0.5.17 (MineToken.sol#47)

detectors.description: Parameter TokenBEP20.transfernewun(address)._newun (MineToken.sol#215) is not in mixedCase

	- _totalSupply = 100000000000000 * 10 ** 9 (MineToken.sol#207)

detectors.description:
approveAndCall(address,uint256,bytes) should be declared external:
	- TokenBEP20.approveAndCall(address,uint256,bytes) (MineToken.sol#285-295)
Moreover, the following function parameters should change its data location:
data location should be calldata
